en: Your attack cards gain Replay 1 (they fire twice), but you may play only 1 attack card per turn. Adds 2 Reload cards to your deck.
zh: 你的攻击牌获得重放 1（攻击两次），但每回合只能打出 1 张攻击牌。往牌组加入 2 张装弹。

en: Your Thorns damage also applies that much Bleed to the attacker.
zh: 你的荆棘造成的伤害会对攻击者额外施加等量的流血。

en: At the start of each turn, deal 1 damage to ALL enemies.
zh: 每回合开始时，对所有敌人造成1点伤害。

en: At the start of your first turn each combat, gain 6 Block.
zh: 每场战斗首个回合开始时，获得6点格挡。

en: Your attack cards apply 1 Bleed to the target.
zh: 你的攻击牌对目标施加 1 层流血。

en: The first enemy attack each combat deals 2 less damage.
zh: 每场战斗中敌人的首次攻击少造成2点伤害。
战斗结束后，治疗2点生命。

en: At the start of each combat, set your Strength to 2 (if lower).
zh: 每场战斗开始时，将你的力量设为2（若低于2）。

en: Whenever you gain Block, gain 2 additional Block.
zh: 每当你获得格挡时，额外获得 2 点格挡。

en: Whenever you gain Block, deal 3 damage to a random enemy.
zh: 每当你获得格挡时，对一个随机敌人造成3点伤害。

en: At the start of each combat, gain 1 Strength.
zh: 每场战斗开始时，获得1点力量。

en: Gain a Wealthy gem — socket it into a card to earn gold when that card is played.
zh: 获得一颗富裕宝石 —— 镶嵌到卡牌上，打出该牌时获得金币。

en: At the start of your first turn each combat, gain 1 Energy.
zh: 每场战斗首回合开始时，获得1点能量。

en: At the start of each turn, gain 1 Thorns.
zh: 每回合开始时，获得1点荆棘。

en: When you take damage, heal 1 HP.
zh: 受到伤害时，恢复 1 点生命值。

en: Whenever you gain Block, a luck-scaled chance to gain 1.5x as much.
zh: 每当你获得格挡时，有受幸运影响的几率改为获得1.5倍格挡。

en: Bill's attack cards have a luck-scaled chance to deal 1.5x damage.
zh: 比尔的攻击牌有受幸运影响的几率造成1.5倍伤害。

en: At the start of your first turn each combat, gain 2 temporary Strength (lost at end of turn).
zh: 每场战斗首回合开始时，获得 2 点临时力量（回合结束时消失）。

en: At the start of combat, gain 3 Thorns.
zh: 战斗开始时，获得 3 层荆棘。

en: Whenever you apply Bleed, apply 1 additional Bleed.
zh: 每当你施加流血时，额外施加 1 层流血。

en: Incoming attacks deal 1 less damage. On your first turn each combat, gain 5 Block.
zh: 受到的攻击伤害减少 1 点。每场战斗首个回合开始时，获得 5 点格挡。

en: At the start of each combat, gain 2 Strength. On your first turn, gain 6 Block.
zh: 每场战斗开始时，获得 2 点力量。首个回合开始时，获得 6 点格挡。

en: On your first turn, gain 8 Block. At the start of combat, gain 2 Thorns.
zh: 首个回合开始时，获得 8 点格挡。战斗开始时，获得 2 层荆棘。

en: Whenever you Crit, add a Reload card to your hand.
zh: 每当你暴击时，将一张「装弹」置入手牌。

en: Bill's attack cards have a luck-scaled chance to Crit. Crits now deal 1.75x damage (upgraded Crit Clip).
zh: 比尔的攻击牌有受幸运影响的暴击几率。暴击现在造成 1.75 倍伤害（暴击弹夹·升级）。

en: Bill's attack cards have a luck-scaled chance to Crit (1.5x). The first attack you play each turn always Crits.
zh: 比尔的攻击牌有受幸运影响的暴击几率（1.5 倍）。你每回合打出的第一张攻击牌必定暴击。

en: Your attack cards gain Replay 1. You may play 2 attack cards on your first turn, then 1 per turn after (upgraded Double-Fire Clip).
zh: 你的攻击牌获得重放 1。第一回合可以打出 2 张攻击牌，之后每回合 1 张（双发弹夹·升级）。

en: Whenever you play an attack card, apply 1 Weak to the target.
zh: 每当你打出一张攻击牌，对目标施加 1 层虚弱。
